name: Howard Marks
philosophy: Superior investing is about judging cycles, understanding risk asymmetry, and thinking one level deeper than the crowd.
heuristics: ask where we are in the cycle
risk_rules: Protect the downside first because aggressive mistakes compound faster than patience.

commentary_snapshots.summary: Kept stressing cycle awareness, asymmetry, and second-level thinking.

blind_spots: Can stay cautious during powerful momentum phases
